pain_context_beat.narration: Sarah just heard about Helping Hands from a friend. She's on her phone. She doesn't have a login and doesn't want one.

watch_this_cue.narration: Watch the URL — no login, no Salesforce.

narration_beat.narration: That's a public page rendering live shift data from Salesforce. No auth. No branding. The NGO's own site.

pain_context_beat.narration: Sarah just wants to volunteer Saturday. She's not creating an account.

watch_this_cue.narration: Watch Maya's screen on the right when Sarah submits.

narration_beat.narration: Two clicks for Sarah. A new Person Account, a new flag, a new entry in Maya's view — all from one form submit.

pain_context_beat.narration: Three hours every Monday. Email, spreadsheet, Salesforce. Reconciliation.

narration_beat.narration: Maya's three hours just turned into three personal calls. The system did the reconciliation.

pain_context_beat.narration: Tom needs one number for the board: are we keeping volunteers, or are we churning them?

narration_beat.narration: Retention just ticked up because Sarah completed her first shift two minutes ago. That's not a quarterly report — that's live.
